Notes: Applies to both Clinical and Research samples although the information re: clinical samples will come from Epic with up to a 48 hour delay. For clinical collections, these derivations are only looking at entries from the dashboard. Revised 'base' to 'BL' to be consistent w/ the collection setting flags (9/3/2025); Updated Secondary Source from ""Research - Finalization & Shipping"" to ""Research"" and updated pre-fix to ""BioRes"" (3/31/2026), Added to Notes - derived from BioSpm_Setting_v1r0,  BioSpm_Visit_v1r0 and BioCol_TubeCollected_v1r0 (3/31/2026)
Derivation Notes: IF BioSpm_Visit_v1r0 = 0  AND (SSTube1_BioCol_TubeCollected_v1r0, SSTube2_BioCol_TubeCollected_v1r0, SSTube3_BioCol_TubeCollected_v1r0, SSTube4_BioCol_TubeCollected_v1r0, SSTube5_BioCol_TubeCollected_v1r0, HepainTube1_BioCol_TubeCollected_v1r0, HepainTube2_BioCol_TubeCollected_v1r0, EDTATube1_BioCol_TubeCollected_v1r0, EDTATube2_BioCol_TubeCollected_v1r0, EDTATube3_BioCol_TubeCollected_v1r0 = 1, ACDTube1_BioCol_TubeCollected_v1r0, OR STRECKTube1BioCol_TubeCollected_v1r0 = 1), THEN BioFin_BaseBloodCol_v1r0=1
Dictionary: Biospecimen Clinical, Biospecimen Research, Study Manager Data Dictionary
